summary: Frontend bug-fix verification for Ultras Hub. All 4 reported bugs are FIXED. Light regression pass mostly passed; one minor concern with translate-btn on news page.

ui_bugs.issue: No element with data-testid='translate-btn' found on News page after 3s wait. May be rendered per-card only when a MARCA article is visible/expanded — needs confirmation from main agent.

verification_results.1_compact_hero: PASS — hero row contains 'بث حي' badge + small 'أستوديو كرة القدم' title + two buttons ('النتائج والمواعيد', 'الصحف') on a single slim row. No large image/tall block. Confirmed via screenshot.
verification_results.2_weather_removed: PASS — document.getElementById('w-icon'/'w-deg'/'w-city') all return null/false. Clock retained: tb-time=true, tb-date=true (shows '03:35 الأحد, 12 يوليو').
verification_results.3_news_slider_fresh: PASS — [data-testid='news-slide'] count = 14. Sources present in DOM: الجزيرة (Al Jazeera), ماركا/MARCA, BBC Football, Sky Sports. Banned sources absent: 'سبورت 360'=false, 'BBC عربي'=false. Content is current football (World Cup semi-final coverage, Bellingham, Tuchel England etc.).
verification_results.4_ticker_multi_item: PASS — [data-testid='news-ticker'] exists; '#ticker-move .ticker-item' count = 28 (matches ~14 duplicated x2 spec).
verification_results.regression_nav: PASS — nav-home, nav-matches, nav-news, nav-saudi, nav-world, nav-stars, nav-live all clickable and switch pages.
verification_results.regression_news_translate: INCONCLUSIVE — translate-btn not immediately found on nav-news load; likely conditional per-card. Not a blocker.

action_items: (Optional) Confirm translate-btn on News page appears for MARCA cards — testing agent could not locate it in a top-level query 3s after opening News tab.
critical_code_review_comments: index.html is a single monolithic file; consider splitting concerns (news module, matches module, player module) for maintainability once feature-frozen.
Ticker duplication (x2 nodes) is fine for CSS marquee but ensure aria-hidden on the duplicate copy for screen-reader accessibility.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 4 reported bugs; 6/7 regression checks fully passed, 1 inconclusive

context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_3 verified the 4 home-page bug fixes: compact hero, weather removal, fresh multi-source news slider (14 cards), multi-item ticker (28 nodes). Only open item is verifying translate-btn on MARCA news cards.
